change_reason: Child 4 (WI-4324) Ollama Phase 1: insert DCL-OLLAMA-TOOL-PARITY-GATE-001 per GO -002; content derived from bridge/gtkb-ollama-integration-phase-1-001.md drafts + -003 guard-adapter delta; owner anchor DELIB-20260663.
explicit_change_request: Implement Child 4 (gtkb-ollama-integration-phase-1-governance-impl): WI-4324 -- insert the 5 formal MemBase specs via formal-artifact-approval packets. As interactive Prime I mint packets with presented_to_user=true and transcript_captured=true by presenting full artifact content in chat. Owner anchor DELIB-20260663; GO bridge/gtkb-ollama-integration-phase-1-governance-impl-002.md.
full_content:
{
  "id": "DCL-OLLAMA-TOOL-PARITY-GATE-001",
  "type": "design_constraint",
  "status": "specified",
  "title": "Ollama full-parity tools must dispatch through a fail-closed GT-KB guard adapter",
  "scope": "GT-KB Ollama harness tool surface and safety-control delegation. Affected by ADR-OLLAMA-HARNESS-ADOPTION-001.",
  "tags": ["design-constraint", "ollama", "tool-parity", "guard-adapter", "fail-closed", "phase-1"],
  "description": "Constraint: scripts/ollama_harness.py MAY expose the canonical full tool set (\"Read\", \"Write\", \"Edit\", \"Grep\", \"Glob\", \"Bash\") ONLY when every mutating tool path dispatches through a local guard adapter before mutation. The shim MUST NOT implement raw filesystem writes, raw edits, or raw shell execution as the first action for a model-requested Write, Edit, or Bash. Routing-config allowed_tools MUST be a subset of the canonical six; non-canonical names are rejected at load time.\n\nGuard coverage:\n- Write must run project-root containment, credential scan, scanner-safe-writer (where applicable), bridge-compliance-gate, narrative-artifact-approval-gate, and implementation-start-gate before the file is persisted.\n- Edit must run project-root containment, credential scan, bridge-compliance-gate, narrative-artifact-approval-gate, and implementation-start-gate before the file is changed.\n- Bash must run project-root containment, destructive-gate, formal-artifact-approval-gate, and implementation-start-gate before command execution.\n\nFail-closed rule: any guard deny, ask/checkpoint, parse failure, missing guard file, nonzero adapter error, out-of-root path, unrecognized tool schema, or ambiguous path resolution MUST stop the model tool call. The adapter returns a structured error to the model and MUST NOT partially apply the mutation.\n\nRoot-boundary rule: the adapter MUST reject out-of-root paths before invoking the guard scripts and MUST NOT normalize an out-of-root path back into scope.\n\nAuthor-metadata rule: for bridge-file and governed-document writes, the adapter MUST set GTKB_AUTHOR_MODEL, GTKB_AUTHOR_MODEL_VERSION, and the Ollama harness identity metadata before invoking guard scripts and before mutation.\n\nDestructive-action delegation: the shim MUST NOT implement its own destructive-allowlist; the existing destructive-gate remains authoritative.\n\nSeverity: blocking. Non-canonical exposure widens the attack surface; a shim-side bypass undermines a safety control. Affected by: ADR-OLLAMA-HARNESS-ADOPTION-001. Owner decision anchor: DELIB-20260663 AUQ#6 (full parity = full parity with GT-KB guardrails, not raw local authority), as clarified by bridge/gtkb-ollama-integration-phase-1-003.md.",
  "assertions": [
    {"type": "grep", "file": "scripts/ollama_harness.py", "pattern": "CANONICAL_TOOLS", "description": "Shim defines the canonical six-tool set."},
    {"type": "grep", "file": "scripts/ollama_harness.py", "pattern": "invoke_guard_adapter", "description": "Mutating tools dispatch through the fail-closed guard adapter."},
    {"type": "grep", "file": "config/agent-control/harness-capability-registry.toml", "pattern": "tool_guard_adapter_fail_closed = true", "description": "Capability registry declares the fail-closed guard adapter floor for ollama."},
    {"type": "grep", "file": "config/agent-control/harness-capability-registry.toml", "pattern": "advertised_tool_subset", "description": "Capability registry declares ollama advertised_tool_subset (subset of canonical six)."}
  ]
}
